labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Achriom" provides 29 tools focused on web search & research tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation, data access and reading, deletion and cleanup, modification and updates. Key tools: search, get_details, get_stats, update_status, update_rating.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Web Search & Research" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: search, fetch.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the USER'S COLLECTION by title, creator, genre, or theme. Returns items they own with status, ratings, and for box sets, the list of contained albums. Use this to answer questions about what the user has.

query.description: Search query (matches title, author/artist/director/creator, genres, or themes)

filter.description: Filter by status or rating. Books: all, reading, finished, unread, abandoned, rated, unrated. Movies/shows/anime: all, watching, watched, unwatched, abandoned, rated, unrated. Albums: all, listening, played, unheard, saved, rated, unrated.

tools.name: get_details
tools.description: Get FULL details of an item FROM THE USER'S COLLECTION including AI analysis, user notes, rating, timeline, and all metadata. For albums: includes track list with durations. For box sets: lists ALL contained albums. Use this to answer specific questions about items the user owns.

title.description: The title to look up (partial match supported)

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get collection statistics including progress, rating distribution, genre/theme breakdown, and timeline. If no media_type specified, returns combined stats.

media_type.description: Type of media (optional - omit for all)

tools.name: update_status
tools.description: Update status. Books: unread, reading, finished, abandoned. Movies/shows/anime: unwatched, watching, watched, abandoned. Albums: unheard, listening, played, saved.

title.description: The title to update (partial match supported)

tools.name: update_rating
tools.description: Set or update user rating (1-5 stars).

title.description: The title to rate (partial match supported)

tools.name: update_notes
tools.description: Add or update personal notes for an item.

title.description: The title (partial match supported)

notes.description: The notes to save (replaces existing notes)

tools.name: get_by_rating
tools.description: Get items filtered by user rating range.

tools.name: get_by_status
tools.description: Get items filtered by status. Books: unread, reading, finished, abandoned. Movies/shows/anime: unwatched, watching, watched, abandoned. Albums: unheard, listening, played, saved.

tools.name: get_timeline
tools.description: Get timeline showing items started and finished over time.

tools.name: edit_item
tools.description: Edit metadata (title, creator, external ID). Use new_external_id to re-link to correct database entry, then call re_enrich to fetch correct metadata.

title.description: Current title (partial match supported)

new_external_id.description: New external ID to re-link item

tools.name: lookup_item
tools.description: Search EXTERNAL databases (NOT the user's collection) to find items BEFORE adding them. Use search/get_details for items the user already owns. Data sources: Books=OpenLibrary, Movies/Shows=TMDB, Albums=Discogs, Anime=AniList. Use anime (not show) for Japanese animation.

media_type.description: Type of media to search. Use anime for Japanese animation, show for live-action/Western series.

title.description: Title to search for

tools.name: add_item
tools.description: Add a new item to the library. For best results, use lookup_item first to get the external_id. IMPORTANT: Use anime (not show) for ALL Japanese animation including series, movies, OVAs.

media_type.description: Type of media. Use anime for Japanese animation (Cowboy Bebop, Spirited Away, etc), show for live-action/Western animation.

title.description: The title to add

external_id.description: External database ID for exact matching

tools.name: delete_item
tools.description: Delete an item from the library.

title.description: The title to delete (partial match supported)

tools.name: re_enrich
tools.description: Re-fetch all metadata from external sources. Use when item has wrong data.

title.description: The title to re-enrich (partial match supported)

tools.name: search_youtube
tools.description: Search YouTube for relevant videos (interviews, trailers, analysis, music videos).

max_results.description: Number of videos to return (1-5, default 3)

tools.name: get_track_previews
tools.description: Get playable 30-second audio previews for tracks from an album IN THE USER'S LIBRARY.

tools.name: preview_album
tools.description: Preview any album from Apple Music WITHOUT adding to library. Use this to sample before committing to add. Returns playable 30-second previews.

title.description: Album title

tools.name: search_book_content
tools.description: Semantic search within an uploaded book (EPUB/PDF). Uses AI embeddings to find relevant passages.

tools.name: read_book_section
tools.description: Read a specific section of an uploaded book by line numbers.

tools.name: bulk_update_status
tools.description: Update status for multiple items at once.

tools.name: random_pick
tools.description: Pick random item(s) for serendipitous discovery.

filter.description: Filter which items to pick from (default: all)

tools.name: expand_research_scope
tools.description: Add an item to the current research corpus (focused research mode only).

title.description: Title of the item to add

media_type.description: Type of media to add to the research scope

tools.name: get_scope_info
tools.description: Get information about the current research scope.

tools.name: get_context
tools.description: Get user context for adaptive conversation. Returns lifecycle stage and behavioral signals.

tools.name: get_signals
tools.description: Get behavioral signals: theme repetition, consumption gaps, and recent activity.

tools.name: search_conversations
tools.description: Search past conversations with this user. Supports semantic search - finds conceptually related conversations, not just keyword matches.

tools.name: save_insight
tools.description: Save a lasting insight about the user to their persistent profile. Use when you discover meaningful patterns, preferences, personal connections to media, or cross-media themes.

category.description: Category: taste_pattern (recurring themes/patterns), key_fact (personal context), cross_media_connection (links between media types), preference (how they want to interact)

insight.description: The insight to save. Be concise but specific.

tools.name: get_user_profile
tools.description: Get the persistent profile built from past conversations. Shows taste patterns, key facts, cross-media connections, and preferences.

tools.name: show_item
tools.description: ALWAYS use this tool when users say "show me", "open", "go to", "take me to", or "pull up" an item. This navigates them to the item's detail page. Works on ALL clients (web app, iOS app, Claude Desktop) - triggers navigation or returns clickable URL. Do NOT just describe the item when they want to SEE it.

title.description: The title to show (partial match supported)
